manual_visual_notes: Settings was corrected from an initial four-column hub that caused narrow text wrapping to a two-column hub that keeps endpoint and status text readable.
Diagnostics chart renders as an in-app SVG chart block and remains fixture/demo-only, not runtime health evidence.
Accounts and API Connections tables remain horizontally bounded with existing action buttons and no new route editor controls.
resume_from_here: Use screenshots as evidence during final audit and closeout.
